instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that conditionally includes `partials/promo-banner.ftl` only when boolean `showPromo` is true. Always render the main content area regardless of the promo flag.
code:
<#-- Model: showPromo: boolean, pageTitle: string --> <#if showPromo!false> <#include "partials/promo-banner.ftl">

${pageTitle?html}
